page.content: The following analysis provides insight into Prologis Inc.'s operational performance, particularly focusing on Same-property Net Operating Income (NOI) growth and lease expiry schedules. In 2023, the overall Same-property NOI growth was reported at 5.2%, reflecting a robust increase in rental income across the portfolio. This growth trajectory is expected to enhance the company’s financial resilience, with projections for 2024 indicating a further increase to 6.0%.

lines.text: The following analysis provides insight into Prologis Inc.'s operational performance, particularly focusing on Same-property
Net Operating Income (NOI) growth and lease expiry schedules. In 2023, the overall Same-property NOI growth was reported
at 5.2%, reflecting a robust increase in rental income across the portfolio. This growth trajectory is expected to enhance the
company’s financial resilience, with projections for 2024 indicating a further increase to 6.0%.

page.content: The upcoming lease expirations are notable, with approximately 1,500,000 square feet of space set to renew, positioning the company to capitalize on favorable market conditions. Notably, the average rental rate is anticipated to remain stable at $12.00 per square foot, supporting the overall growth strategy.

lines.text: The upcoming lease expirations are notable, with approximately 1,500,000 square feet of space set to renew, positioning the
company to capitalize on favorable market conditions. Notably, the average rental rate is anticipated to remain stable at $12.00
per square foot, supporting the overall growth strategy.

page.content: The lease expiry schedule indicates that 85% of the leases will be on a five-year term, ensuring a steady income stream. Furthermore, the company anticipates additional capital from lease renewals, with expected contributions of $300M and $50M in various segments. In this context, Prologis Inc.’s proactive management strategies and strong market positioning are expected to yield an impressive $18M in growth, further solidifying its leadership in the logistics real estate sector. As the market outlook remains positive, stakeholders can expect continued performance improvements moving forward.
